summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HabitGen React Native Expo habit tracker app. Successfully tested splash screen and 3-step onboarding flow, but encountered critical navigation issue preventing access to main app features after onboarding completion.

ui_bugs.issue: LET'S GO button completes onboarding but fails to navigate to Today screen properly

integration_issues.issue: Navigation from onboarding to TabNavigator (Today screen) is broken

passed_tests: Splash screen displays HABITGEN title and pledge text
3-step onboarding flow navigation works (wake time → bed time → goals)
Wake up time selection works (7:00 AM selection confirmed)
Bed time selection works (11:00 PM selection confirmed)
Goals selection screen shows multiple categories (Study, Coding, Sleeping, etc.)
Primary goal selection works (Study goal can be made primary)
UI styling is polished with proper dark theme and orange/purple accents
Button interactions work (NEXT, Back buttons functional)
Goal category cards show proper icons and colors
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix navigation issue from onboarding completion (LET'S GO button) to Today screen. The onboarding completes but fails to navigate to the main TabNavigator. This blocks testing of all main app features including: Today screen stats/habits, timer functionality with break behavior, 4-tab navigation, Journey paywall, History charts, Account screen, habit CRUD operations, and Supabase authentication. Investigate AppNavigator navigation logic and onboarding completion flow.
